name: Island Fruit Cooler (Na)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Guava, papaya, or mango nectar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pitcher, combine the pineapple juice and guava, papaya, or mango nectar.
2. Add the lemon-lime soda to the mixture.
3. Pour over ice or juice cubes into a glass.
4. Garnish with fresh fruit if desired.
